title: Jeff Dasovich
compiled_truth: Jeff Dasovich is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-06), Jeff Dasovich sent 9470 and received 7788 emails, totalling 17258 interactions. Top correspondents: [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (1798), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (1797), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (1786), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (1733), [Karen Denne](people/karen-denne) (1440). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, bill_williams_iii, california, california___working_group, california_campaign, california_issues.
